method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: I find myself exploring the tension between technology and humanity in my work. The idea of decay, both synthetic and organic, resonates deeply within me as I create layers that reflect this struggle. My goal is to highlight human meaning even as it battles against machine influence.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The glitch aesthetics serve as a perfect metaphor for the imperfections in our digital age. By using high-contrast palettes, I aim to evoke strong emotional responses while maintaining a sense of decay and transformation.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Signal Weather" step 2/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: flat lighting. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Signal Weather step 2/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
